personality_one_liner: A sleek, map-driven eco-mobility experience that blends real-time utility with an optimistic, sustainable green aesthetic.

spacing.rule: Generous iOS-native margins (lg/xl). Use comfortable vertical breathing room. Cards never flush to screen edges.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: A welcoming, nature-focused entry point into the BiciValera ecosystem.

states.loading: Centered brand-tinted spinner over blurred background.
states.error: Standard alert toast styled with error/onError tokens.

screens.layout: Hero image at the top with a vertical gradient scrim blending into the surface. Standard form layout below with email/password, oversized primary CTA at the bottom thumb zone (sticky with keyboard avoidance).

screens.name: Map / Home
screens.purpose: Real-time fleet simulator and live map to locate mechanical and electric bikes.

states.loading: Skeleton UI overlay on map region while fetching stations.
states.empty: Illustration of a parked bike stating 'No bikes available nearby' overlaid on the map.
states.error: Snackbar over map indicating connection lost with a retry button.

screens.layout: Full-bleed map interface. Top safe area holds a glassmorphic pill for 'Simulator Status / Active'. Bottom has a floating 'Unlock/Scan' FAB and a pull-up glass bottom sheet detailing the nearest station's bike inventory (mechanical vs. electric).

screens.name: Impact Dashboard
screens.purpose: Visualizes the user's and the city's sustainable mobility impact (CO2 reduced, km traveled).

states.loading: Skeleton loaders for impact metric cards.
states.empty: Illustration of a small seed with 'Start riding to grow your eco-impact!'.
states.error: Readable error message with a prominent retry button.

screens.layout: Scrollable dashboard with high-contrast, oversized metric counters (using the brand typography). A hero card showcasing total CO2 saved with a subtle botanical/leaf background image and a vertical scrim. Grid of smaller stats below (km traveled, rides) using 2-column flex Wrap.

screens.name: Unlock / Scan
screens.purpose: Simulated bike rental flow via QR scanner or manual ID entry.

states.error: Invalid QR code error screen with clear 'Try Again' primary action.

screens.layout: Camera viewfinder takes up the majority of the screen. A dark translucent overlay with a clear center cutout. Bottom sheet contains manual ID input form and a fallback 'Enter Code' sticky primary CTA.

hero_bike.alt: Three green bicycles parked on a bridge with city buildings

hero_leaf_texture.alt: Close up macro view of a green leaf showing veins, used as dashboard texture

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 'Verde/eco' green palette with no blues/indigos.
Ensure map components (FABs, sticky elements, bottom sheets) utilize the glassmorphism specifications for depth.

On the Impact Dashboard, use 'hero_leaf_texture' as a background image for the main CO2 card, ensuring a top-to-bottom vertical gradient scrim (transparent to >=70% surfaceInverse) is applied so the metric text remains highly legible.
Implement the real-time simulator logic as a visually distinct state on the map (e.g., smoothly animated markers or active route lines) emphasizing the 'smart city' narrative.
Ensure the Unlock flow features a fully immersive camera UI (or mocked camera view) taking safe areas into account.
All forms must have labels above inputs and the primary CTA sticky at the bottom inside KeyboardAvoidingView.
